phase_name: parts-bin polish — detail, edit, spec display

completed_tasks.name: Parts Bin thumbnails 60px, category only (brand removed from rows)
On Hand section above In Storage
Spec data display in both mod detail and part detail pages (job_specs + spec_templates)
Parts bin edit: full spec fields (kraft aesthetic), darker placeholder, kraft toggles/checkboxes
Parts bin edit: fix photo picker only allowing 1 photo (remount via key, not value clear)

remaining_tasks.name: Test multiple photo fix on parts bin edit page
remaining_tasks.notes: User hasn't tested yet — confirm photo picker reopens after first selection on device.

remaining_tasks.name: Test remove-mod → parts bin flow on gdimension.app
remaining_tasks.notes: Tap mod on build sheet → mod detail → REMOVE → Move to Storage. DML grants applied, should succeed.

remaining_tasks.name: Test Add Part via FAB on parts bin page
remaining_tasks.notes: Full 3-step kraft flow. Part should appear in On Hand section.

remaining_tasks.name: Test Put Back flow — tap Put Back on a parts bin item
remaining_tasks.notes: Should move part back to build sheet.

decisions.decision: On Hand listed above In Storage
decisions.rationale: On Hand parts are actionable (ready to install); In Storage is archived history. Inbox before shelf.

decisions.decision: Brand removed from part list rows — category badge only
decisions.rationale: Cleaner row; brand visible on detail page

decisions.decision: Part edit uses separate page /tuning/parts-bin/:partId/edit, not inline editing
decisions.rationale: Consistent with mod detail → mod edit pattern

decisions.decision: Spec display grouped by group_label, 2-col grid in detail pages
decisions.rationale: Matches density of info without overwhelming the page

decisions.decision: Photo input remounts via key increment instead of value clear
decisions.rationale: e.target.value = '' prevents iOS file picker from reopening on subsequent taps

next_action: Test the multiple-photo fix on device. Then run the 3 manual QA flows: remove-mod, add part via FAB, put back.
context_notes: Parts bin is now fully featured: list with thumbnails, detail page with full spec display, edit page with full spec editing in kraft aesthetic. All 6 sessions worth of work is pushed to Vercel. The only remaining work is manual QA on gdimension.app.
